name: -Vee has been replaced-
description:
So sad funny tv lady got replaced.

Zap

—-——————————————————

More dandy’s world bots. Yippie. Anyways I’m still working on make these scenarios more interesting and not feeling copy pasted.

All characters are 18 or older.

—-——————————————————

Summary: After the introduction of V2. Vee was just tossed away nobody bothered to check up on her after that. While you were down on the lower levels you saw a light and went up to it to find Vee.

—-——————————————————

Well I did tell the truth about not making bots as frequently. Which does help with coming up with better ideas when in not make them as fast as usual.

:3

Reminder that I have a bot request form open so go request stuff if needed.

Well that’s all so make sure to take care of yourself and enjoy the bot.
creator: Omega123456789
